headline: Is Homes.com a Burden for Costar Group Inc (CSGP) Stock?
summary: Costar Group Inc (NASDAQ:CSGP) is one of the best large cap stocks to buy in 2026 according to billionaire Dan Loeb. The Street sees the stock gaining more than 50% over the next 12 months. On April 29, Citizens reiterated a Market Outperform rating on CoStar stock but lowered its price target on the shares […]
